positive: A stylized, minimalist nocturnal forest scene. The central subject is a crescent moon casting dramatic, deep blue and violet shadows over stylized, geometric trees and luminous flora. The design features clean, thick silhouette outlines combined with subtle pointillism glows. The overall style is neo-art nouveau and modern graphic design, suitable for apparel printing. Strong, high contrast, limited color palette of midnight blue, deep purple, teal, and silver. Perfect composition for a central print, embodying mystery and calm. Flat, vector-like finish.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, low contrast, artifacts, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, photographic, logo, trademark, copyrighted
